headline: 33rd Middle East Petroleum & Gas Conference (MPGC) on June 2-3 to Convene Global Leaders Amid Historic Supply Shock
summary: The 33rd annual Middle East Petroleum & Gas Conference (MPGC) will take place in London on June 2–3, 2026, convening senior decision-makers from energy and finance as the closure of the Strait of Hormuz—the largest supply disruption in the history of oil markets—continues, confronting the global oil and natural gas community with profound uncertainty, market volatility and rapid reshaping of trade.
